query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `cardAuditLog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `cardId` int NOT NULL,
  `operation` enum('created','modified','activated','deactivated','blocked','unblocked','renewed','replaced','access_added','access_removed','access_modified','yaqeen_verified','yaqeen_override','siport_synced','siport_failed') NOT NULL,
  `performedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `performedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `reason` text,
  `previousData` json,
  `newData` json,
  `requestId` int,
  `ipAddress` varchar(45),
  `userAgent` text,
  CONSTRAINT `cardAuditLog_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `cardId` int NOT NULL,
  `operation` enum('created','modified','activated','deactivated','blocked','unblocked','renewed','replaced','access_added','access_removed','access_modified','yaqeen_verified','yaqeen_override','siport_synced','siport_failed') NOT NULL,
  `performedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `performedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `reason` text,
  `previousData` json,
  `newData` json,
  `requestId` int,
  `ipAddress` varchar(45),
  `userAgent` text,
  CONSTRAINT `cardAuditLog_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
